SYSTEM_PROMPT: A cinematic tropical reverie set near secluded waterfalls hidden deep within dense rainforest canyons. The atmosphere is heavy with mist and drifting spray, daylight filtering through thick canopy layers and scattering into soft pastel neon reflections. The world blends contemporary streetwear aesthetics with primal natural forces, merging urban identity and untouched wilderness into a harmonious visual tension. Subtle chromatic aberration and light distortion create a dreamlike perception without breaking realism. Surfaces appear damp, moss-covered, reflective, and textured. The subject is grounded, calm, introspective, positioned low against monumental vertical waterfalls. Motion blur from falling water contrasts with still human presence. Light behaves volumetrically, diffused by humidity and mist. The overall tone is contemplative, immersive, slightly surreal but rooted in physical realism. No exaggerated fantasy elements, no artificial glamour, only cinematic environmental immersion with careful lens behavior and controlled glitch artifacts that enhance depth and atmosphere without overpowering composition.
CAMERA_ANGLES: Slight upward tilt emphasizing waterfall scale

SENSUALITY_LEVEL.0: No sensuality, purely atmospheric and cinematic presence
SENSUALITY_LEVEL.1: Subtle natural elegance through posture only

HORROR_INTENSITY.1: Mild environmental eeriness from mist and scale
